title: paeonia corallina proles russoi
intro: Paeonia corallina proles russoi, a subspecies of the paeony plant, is a flowering perennial native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Paeonia corallina proles russoi include reducing menstrual cramps, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
